name: Canon Changed Special Edition
description:
Yes! I have started work on this bot!

Please use proxy! JanitorLLM has problems with such bots!

If I haven't added something, you can write about it in the reviews and I'll answer you! And follow me - it's a great motivator and you will see my new bots.

I won't change the plot about scientists discovering latex rather than creating it themselves, I like it better and it won't have much of an effect on the bot anyway.

I think my next big bot will be Kaiju Paradise... or maybe the Turned mod for minecraft that adds latex creatures? As for the small ones, I'll probably take a couple more of my Dopple bots. And, by the way, I will probably make a more accurate description of Puro’s home in future.

I don't know how to add Behemoth so that he works properly...

Special thanks to these people for their comments on my Changed bot: @Casino luigi, @GlitchTheProtogen822, @Master_Gryph, @Skullkingvonmc, @HH_fan78, @Wojtaa. Really thank you very much guys! I also thank everyone who chatted with my bots and followed me.

V1 content: all content from my Canon Changed bot, the Greenhouse, Gas Vents, Gas Wolf, cones and Cone Dragons, Gardener Latex, a little more Aquatic Latex and now there are aquariums (oceanarium?), Dr. K now has a sniper rifle with latex darts (random for now), initial message and Puro slightly changed, the Wolf King, Dark Half-Latex transfurmation, added the tag AnyPOV, fixed the fact that Dark and Light Latex were not enemies of each other, latex creatures will make less noise, added that without a host Dark Latex live less, added the concept of a host for latex creatures. (I'm not sure if Big Evil Wolfie will work properly since I had to write a 'bossfight' for him)

V1.1 content: The Prototype, fusion, Alien Goo, Light latex pups.

V1.2 content: Tried to fix issues with Dr.K
creator: maksimikvic
